info.english_meaning: to worshipto honourto pray to serve
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: viBAgasevayoH ' iti drume (Slo. 123)  ' sevAyAM Bajate Bajediti Baje: viSrARane BAjayed  Amarde tu Banakti BAjayati RO BAjeH pfTakkarmaRi ' (Slo. 66) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apa te gavAM suBage BajAma' (f॰10.108.9) apodDftya BAgaM gAste dadAmetyAha
'apa te gavAM suBage BajAma' (f0 101089) pustake paWitacara fkcaraRaH sAyaRIyaM vyAKyAnamupanyasitumihAnuvAdaH Aha ca BAzyakAraH--parvatAdapagamayya BajAma viBajAma tvaM ca vayaM ceti
'samaBakta vipraH sumatiM nadInAm' (f॰3.33.12) samaBakta=avfta sumatO BAgI baBUvetyarTaH
'aDyayanadozErna samBakzyAmahe' (ni॰1.2.5 ityatra durgaH) saMyokzyAmaha ityarTaH
'yacca BUtaM samBajate' (BA॰SAM॰91.13) durbalamannAdinA sevata ityarTaH
'satsavratA ye tu narAH kftajYA Darme ratAstEH saha samBajante' (BA॰SAM॰299.37) (suKaM) viBajya sevanta ityAha
'ftvijo vfRIte' (ASva॰gf॰1.20.1) ityasya vyAKyAyAM vfRIte karmArTaM parigfhRAtIti haradattaH
'sa vE vo varaM vfRA iti' (E॰brA॰3.33) atra vfRE samBajAmIti zaqguru॰
'na devA daRqamAdAya rakzanti paSupAlavat yaM tu rakzitumicCanti budDyA saMviBajanti tam' (BA0 u0 3540).. saMviBajanti=saMyuYjanti
'Same'Bireme virarAma pApAd Beje damaM saMvibaBAja sADUn' (budDa0 233) sADuByo dadAvityAha
'sambanDAyogyamapi taM kftajYatvavaSaMvadaH saMviBeje sa BujagaH kanyayA ca Danena ca' (rAja0 1243).. saMviBeje=sizeve kanyAdAnena DanadAnena ca idaM dvayaM dadAvityarTaH
'atiriktEH saMviBajed BogEranyAnakiYcanAn' (BA0 SAM 25923) viBajya saMyojayedityAha
'snigDajanasaMviBaktaM hi du:KaM sahyavedanaM Bavati' (SA0 4) saMviBaktam=viBajya sADAraRIkftam

'BavantamASritAH kfzRa saMviBaktASca sarvaSaH' (hari0 212121) saMviBaktAH=samIcInaviSizwaBaktimantaH atrArTe'yaM viralaH prayogaH mitaM BuNkte saMviBajyASriteByaH saMviBajya=svaBogyasyArTajAtasyEkadeSaM pradAya
'saMviBajyAgrato viprAn sraktAmbUlAnulepanEH' (BA0 pu0 107013) viBAgapUrvakaM saMyojya sragAdIni vipreByo dattvetyarTaH
'svAmI rikTakrayasaMviBAgaparigrahADigamezu' (gO0 Da0 2139) saMviBAgaH=BrAtrAdInAM sADAraRasya parasparaviBAgaH
'tapasaH saMviBAgena Bavantamapi yokzyate' (BA0 u0 11418) saMviBAgaH=aMSaH ekadeSaH
'saMBAzaRamapi saMviBAgamaDye kurvanti' (kA0 Suka0) saMviBAgaH=upahAraH dAnam pratigrahaH
'vatsalaM saMviBaktAramupajIvanti taM narAH' (BA0 SAM0 7537) saMviBaktAram=dAtAram
'saMviBaktA ca dAtA ca BogavAn suKavAnnaraH' (BA0 vana0 25924) saMviBaktA=annAderviBAgakartA suKavAnityasya sTAne suKIti pARinIyA icCanti
Satena vAryA ftvijaH' (pA0 31101 sUtre vfttiH) ftvijo hi Danena saMviBaktavyA ityastyaniroDaH (=apratibanDaH) iti nyAsaH saMviBaktavyA varItuM SakyAH
'yaTA rAjA vijitya sve vitte BAryAn anvABajet' (jE0 SrA0 2140) anvABajet anukrameRa ABajet BAginaH kuryAt
'mA no nirBAg vasunaH sAdanaspfSaH' (f0 9728) mA'smAnnirBAkzIH nirBAgAnmA sma karor vasuno rAya ityAha
'nABAnedizwaM mAnavaM brahmacaryaM vasantaM BrAtaro niraBajantso'bravIdetya kiM mahyamaBAkteti' (E0 brA0 514) niraBajan=dAye BAgarahitamakurvan
'prajApatirvE rudraM yajYAnniraBajat' (go0 brA0 u0 12) ukto'rTaH
'nirdvizantaM divo niH pfTivyA nirantarikzAd BajAma' (aTarva0 1676) iha nirityAvftto BUyase'rTAya arTe tvaviSezaH
'pfTivyAstaM nirBajAmo yosmAndvezwi yaM vayaM dvizmaH' (aTarva0 10525)
'tuzErvE PalIkaraRErdevA haviryajYeByo rakzAMsi niraBajan' (E0 brA 67) PalIkaraRAMstuzAndattvA rakzAMsi haviryajYaByo'vaYcayantetyAha
'sarvasmAtsapatnAnnirBajati' (Sa0 brA0 15416) ukto'rTaH
'nizwaM Baja yo amitro asya' (aTarva0 4222) nizwaM nistam taM nirBaja=grAmAdiByo nirBaktaM kurvityarTaH
'yadEva taM svena BAgaDeyena nirBajantyaTEva sa nirBakto Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 11742) atra tftIyASruterarTAntarapratyayaH BAgaDeyena nirBajanti=BAgavantaM kurvanti
'yajYapatimfzaya enasAhurnirBaktam' (aTarva0 2352) nirBaktaM nirBAgaM dOrgatyayuktam enaseti itTamBUtalakzaRe tftIyA
'kUwAkzadevinaH pApAnnirBajed dyUtamaRqalAt' (nAradIyamanu0) nirBajet=nirvAsayet nirBaktamOzaDaM bahUpakaroti kiYcidanyadaSanamanaSitvA sevitaM nirBaktamucyate
'sa nirBAjyaH svakAdaMSAt kiMcid dattvopajIvanam' (manu0 9207) nirBAjyaH=nirBAgo BAgarahitaH sampAdyaH
'rUpeREvEnaM paSuByo nirBajati' (tE0 saM0 6311) nirBajati nirasyati
'antarikzAttaM nirBajAmo yo smAn dvezwi' (aTarva0 10526) ukto'rTaH
'asyE pfTivyA asmAdannAdyAnnirBajAmi nirBaktaH sa yaM dvizmaH' (tE0 saM0 1661) nirBajAmi nirvAsayAmi niHsArayAmi
'tato nirBakto yo smAndvezwi yaM ca vayaM dvizmaH' (vA0 saM0 225) nirBakto nirgataBAgaH
'taM kzurapraSakalIkftaM kftI patriRAM vyaBajadASramAd bahiH' (raGu0 1129) vyaBajat=viBajya dattavAn
'sanDyAmaNgaladIpikA viBajate SudDAntavfdDo janaH' (vikrama0 32) viBajate=viBAgena sTApayati
'viBaktAH saha jIvanto viBajeranpunaryadi' (manu0 9210) viBajeran=rikTaviBAgaM kurvIran
'kuqavaM kuqavaM sarve vyaBajanta tapasvinaH' (BA0 ASva0 9034)
'vAyavIyErvigaRyante viBaktAH paramARavaH' (yAjYa0 3104) viBaktAH pfTakkftAH viBaktA BrAtaraH viBaktaDanA ityarTaH
'viBaktarakzaHsambADamAsasAdAnilAtmajaH' (rA0 55337) viBaktarakzaHsambADam parihftarAkzasOGam
'vapurviBaktAvayavaM pumAniti' (SiSu0 13) viBaktA viviktatayA dfSyamAnAH (avayavAH)
'kAlaM kAlaviBaktISca' (manu0 124) viBaktayo viBAgAH
'kaTaM sfzwAni BUtAni kaTaM varRaviBaktayaH' (BA0 SAM0 1823) varRaviBaktayaH=dvijAdivarRaviBAgAH
'kaSApAtena dfSyante nAnAvarRaviBaktayaH' (paYcata0 24) varRaviBaktayaH=lohitAdivarRavEcitryARi
'samastatra viBAgaH syAt' (manu0 9120) viBAgoM'SanipAtaH
'tattvavittu mahAbAho guRakarmaviBAgayoH' (gItA0 328) viBAgo Bedo viSezaH
'viBajya merurna yadarTisAtkftaH' (nE0 116) viBajya viBAgaM kftvA SaPalAni kftvetyarTaH
'emaM Baja grAme aSvezu gozu' (aTarva0 4222) imaM grAmAdizu ABaja BAginaM kurvityAha
'prajApati rvE pita FBUn martyAntsato'martyAnkftvA tftIyasavana ABajat' (E0 brA0 612) ukto'rTaH
'tvaM sUrye na A Baja tava kratvA tavotiBiH' (f0 945)
'yA~ ABajo maruta indra some' (f0 3359) he indra yAnmarutaH some BAgino'karorityAha
'A taM Baja sOSravasezvagne ukTa ukTa A Baja SasyamAne' (f0 104510)
'pAhi mA'gne duScaritAd A mA sucarite Baja' (tE0 saM0 11121) sucarita ABaja sucarite BAginaM kuru sucaritavantaM mAM kurviti tAtparyArTaH
'ftavo ha vE devezu yajYe BAgamIzire A no yajYe Bajata mA no yajYAdantargata' (Sa0 brA0 1611) antarityatra vyavaDO vartate yajYAnno mAsma vyavaDAtetyarTaH
'hantemAnasminnukTa ABajA iti' (E0 brA0 320) ABajE AgataBAgAn BAgavataH karomItyAha
'A no Bajasva rADasi' (f0 43221)
'tava vE vayaM smo nu na etasminsAmannABajeti' (jE0 u0 brA0 1618)
'iyaM duruktAt paribADamAnA prARApAnAByAM balamABajantI' (lO0 gf0 4115) ABajantI dadatI (meKalA)
'etadDa vE pitaro manuzyaloka ABaktA Bavanti yadezAM prajA Bavati' (Sa0 brA0 13816) ABaktA BAginaH yadidaM kiYcEvamu tatsarvaM yajYa ABaktam
'yA vE prajA yajYe'nanvABaktAH parABUtA vE tAH' (Sa0 brA0 1524) ukto'rTaH
'ABajanti guRinaH pfTak pfTak pArTa satkftimakftrimAmamI' (SiSu0 1457) ABajanti arhanti prAcIne vEdike sAhitye tvanyAdfSa eva vyavahAra ABajeH sa pustake darSita iti tata eva vijYAnIyaH
'yo BAgo mAmaBiBajate sa dIyatAm' (pA0 1490 sUtre nyAse)
'idaM ratnaM coritacaraM rAjAnaM pratiBajate purA' purA pratiBajate=acireRa pratinivartsyati pratiyAsyati yAvatpurAnipAtayorlaw

prayoga.literature_text: vinASaM kInASo Bajati Danado yAti niDanam
ye Bajanti tu mAM BaktyA mayi te tezu cApyaham
ye yaTA mAM prapadyante tAMstaTEva BajAmyaham
SradDAvAnBajate yo mAM sa me yuktatamo mataH
yA parAM Bajate prItiM vane'pi Bavane yaTA
vEDAtraM kati kati Bajante na kavayaH
viBajAma tataH sarvA vivAdo me na rocate
